items.title: Review weekly project rollup
items.description: Confirm each initiative has current notes, blockers, and next steps.
items.notes: Use this as the main weekly checkpoint before sharing a summary.

items.title: Update vendor follow-up list
items.description: Refresh who still needs outreach and what documents are missing.
items.notes: Check invoices and delivery commitments before sending messages.

items.title: Resolve export formatting issue
items.description: Fix date normalization before analytics snapshots can go live.
items.notes: Blocked until the source data stops mixing UTC and local timestamps.

items.title: Archive outdated policy drafts
items.description: Remove superseded drafts from the active reference list.
items.notes: Archive folder naming now matches the current quarter convention.

items.title: Prepare monthly scorecard draft
items.description: Pull notes into a rough monthly narrative and metrics summary.
items.notes: Leave placeholders where data still needs verification.
